notes: Audits the active Leccinum and scaber-stalk records, converting weak legacy seeds to explicit ID-only HOLD entries and preventing the broad group record from acting as blanket edible authorization.

Completes source-backed identification profiles for ghost bolete, pale oak scaber-stalk, long-stemmed oak scaber-stalk, and oak-loving scaber-stalk; unresolved aspen, birch, and orange-birch food records are moved out of normal edible routing pending stronger species-level safety support.
Completes shrimp of the woods, lobster mushroom, and eastern black trumpet source, route, season, and spore-print applicability fields without changing visible image fields or image-rights metadata.
